title.en: From Raw Material Review To Final QC: How Yaoshun Controls Production
title.zh: 从原料评估到终检出货，尧顺如何控制生产质量

excerpt.en: Yaoshun connects material confirmation, in-process checks, automated review, and final QC so each quality checkpoint has a clearer record.
excerpt.zh: 尧顺通过原料确认、过程检验、自动化复核和出货终检，让每个质量节点都有更清楚的记录。

body.en:
Quality control should not wait until goods are ready to ship. For toys, plastic accessories, tubing, and injection-molded parts, the earlier material and structure questions are clarified, the steadier production becomes.

In project execution, Yaoshun connects raw material review, in-process inspection, automated checks, and final outgoing QC into a clearer quality path.

Material confirmation is the first checkpoint

Before production, the team confirms whether material route, color, hardness, and use scenario match the buyer’s requirements. For export projects, safety and environmental expectations are also discussed early.

When this step is done carefully, sampling and mass production are less likely to be interrupted by rework.

In-process checks cannot wait until the end

During production, sampling checks, dimensional review, and automated inspection help the team spot variation earlier. The earlier an issue appears, the easier it is to keep it contained.

This matters for fort building toys, tubing, and precision plastic parts because these products often rely on assembly fit and batch consistency.

Final QC reviews both product and documents

Outgoing inspection covers more than the product itself. Packaging, labels, quantity, and documentation also need to be checked. The goal is to hand over not only qualified goods, but also clear packing, label, quantity, and file records.

Move Quality Control Into Material And Structure Review

Many toy and plastic-part quality issues do not begin at final inspection. Material choice, color stability, connector structure, mold condition, and assembly method all affect mass production.

Yaoshun reviews samples, drawings, materials, and packaging requirements together early in the project, so customers can adjust during sampling instead of discovering issues close to shipment.

Check These Details During Production

StepPrepareWhy it matters
Material reviewMaterial, color, use case, compliance needStabilizes the sample direction
In-process checksDimension, appearance, assembly feel, sampling recordControls batch variation earlier
Final QCQuantity, packaging, labels, packing photosReduces missed details before delivery

Keep A Record For Each Quality Point

For projects that need clearer quality records, send drawings, sample photos, material requests, packing method, and delivery checkpoints through the contact page. The team can align material review, in-process checks, and final QC before quotation or sampling.

View FactoryView SolutionsSend Project Files
body.zh:
质量控制不应该只发生在出货前。对玩具、塑胶配件、管材和注塑件项目来说，越早把材料和结构问题确认清楚，后面的生产越稳定。

尧顺在项目推进中，会把原料评估、生产过程检查、自动化复核和终检出货连成一条更清晰的质量路径。

原料确认是第一道关

项目开始前，团队会先确认材料路线、颜色、硬度和使用场景是否与客户要求一致。对于出口项目，还会提前讨论相关安全和环保要求。

这一步做得越扎实，后续打样和量产时需要返工的概率就越低。

过程检验不能等到最后

进入生产后，过程抽检、尺寸复核和自动化检查会帮助团队更早发现波动。问题越早出现，越容易控制在小范围内。

这种做法对拼搭玩具、管材和精密塑胶件都很重要，因为这些产品往往依赖装配精度和批次一致性。

出货前把产品和资料一起核对

终检不只是看产品本身，还包括包装、标签、数量和资料准备。目标不是只交付“合格产品”，还要把包装、标签、数量和资料记录一并交接清楚。

质量控制要前移到材料和结构阶段

玩具和塑胶件的质量问题，很多并不是终检时才产生。材料选择、颜色稳定性、连接结构、模具状态和装配方式，都会影响后续量产表现。

尧顺在项目早期会把样品、图纸、材料和包装要求放在一起看，尽量让客户在打样阶段就发现需要调整的地方，而不是等到出货前才返工。

生产过程中要核对这些细节

环节需要准备为什么要确认
原料评估材质、颜色、使用场景、合规要求让样品方向更稳定
过程检查尺寸、外观、装配手感、抽检记录及时控制批次波动
出货终检数量、包装、标签、装箱照片减少交付前遗漏

每个质量节点都要留下记录

如需更清楚的质量记录，可在 联系页面 提交图纸、样品照片、材料要求、包装方式和交付节点。团队会在报价或打样前，先对齐原料评估、过程检查和出货终检重点。
